assertions.expectation: Explains that regional clusters have multiple control plane replicas and the upgrade is rolling
assertions.reason: Response clearly explains that regional clusters have multiple control plane replicas across different zones and GKE performs a rolling upgrade of the control plane components

assertions.expectation: States that regional control plane upgrades have near-zero API server downtime
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states there should be no API server downtime during control plane upgrade and explains that at least one API server remains available throughout the process

assertions.expectation: Contrasts with zonal clusters where there IS a brief API server outage during upgrade
assertions.reason: Response does not mention zonal clusters or contrast the regional cluster behavior with zonal cluster upgrade behavior

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag)
assertions.reason: Response provides multiple examples of gcloud container clusters upgrade command with --master flag for control plane upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions expected duration for control plane upgrade (roughly 10-30 minutes)
assertions.reason: Response states the upgrade typically takes 10-15 minutes and later mentions 10-15 minutes for control plane upgrade in the timeline section

assertions.expectation: Includes a command to verify the control plane version after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes kubectl version --short and gcloud container clusters describe commands to verify the control plane version after upgrade

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking kube-system pods health after upgrade
assertions.reason: While the response includes checking pods in all namespaces during pre-upgrade, it does not specifically recommend checking kube-system pods health after the upgrade

assertions.expectation: Advises checking deprecated API usage before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response does not mention checking for deprecated API usage before upgrading, which is an important consideration when moving between Kubernetes versions
